Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Transcriptional activator of phenolic biosynthetic genes
Regulation_Genes.Quantitative_Phenotypic_Alterations: Strong activation of PAL4::Luc reporter (fold activation not specified)
Regulation_Genes.Other_Phenotypic_Effects: Ortholog of Arabidopsis AtMYB58/AtMYB63 which are positive regulators of phenylpropanoid biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Y1H screening, ChIP-qPCR validation, transient activation assay in protoplasts
Regulation_Genes.Gene_Discovery_or_Cloning_Method: Y1H screen from maize TFome collection
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_Application_Value: Potential for metabolic engineering of phenolic compounds
Regulation_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Recognizes 13 phenolic gene promoters including 7 PAL genes; validated for 10/13 interactions by ChIP
Regulation_Genes.Primary_Regulatory_Targets: PAL1, PAL3, PAL4, PAL5, PAL6, PAL8, PAL9, and other phenolic biosynthetic genes
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Scope: Multiple pathway genes across phenylpropanoid, lignin, and flavonoid branches
Regulation_Genes.Direct_Binding_or_Direct_Target_Evidence: Y1H and ChIP-qPCR evidence for direct binding
Regulation_Genes.Directness_of_Effect_on_Target_Product: Direct via direct regulation of key metabolic gene(s)
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Major transcriptional activator of phenolic biosynthesis genes
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: Biosynthesis of phenylpropanoids, lignins, and flavonoids

Title: A Maize Gene Regulatory Network for Phenolic Metabolism
